response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, aligning with key responsibilities; however, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, minimal detail on vector databases/RAG, and no mention of cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK, raising concerns about GenAI depth and enterprise-scale delivery experience.
strengths: Demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops and projects
Proven ability to design and ship complex systems across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI/GenAI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization
Limited detail on cloud platform expertise beyond AWS CDK and no mention of GCP/Azure
